elcf4R 0.3.0
  • Reference
    • Public datasets for individual electricity load forecasting
    • iFlex Workflow with Shipped Example Data
  • Changelog

Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Frederic Bertrand. Maintainer, author.

  • Fatima Fahs. Author.

  • Myriam Maumy-Bertrand. Author.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Frederic Bertrand and Myriam Maumy (2026). Electricity Load Curves Forecasting at Individual Level, R package version 0.3.0.

@Manual{,
  title = {Electricity Load Curves Forecasting at Individual Level},
  author = {Frederic Bertrand and Myriam Maumy},
  publisher = {manual},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.3.0},
  url = {https://fbertran.github.io/Sobol4R/},
}

Elizaveta Logosha, Myriam Maumy, Frederic Bertrand; Confidence interval determination using discrete event simulations for real estate sales case. AIP Conf. Proc. 31 March 2025; 3182 (1): 100008. <doi:10.1063/5.0246026>

@Article{,
  title = {Confidence interval determination using discrete event simulations for real estate sales case},
  author = {Elizaveta Logosha and Frederic Bertrand and Myriam Maumy-Bertrand},

  year = {2025},
  doi = {10.1063/5.0246026},
}

@Article{,
  title = {Sensitivity analysis of stochastic simulator in the case of sales date prediction},
